# ZeroHuman — Content Engine

> Open-source, self-hosted AI content operations platform (MIT license)

## What it does

ZeroHuman automates the full content lifecycle: research, scoring, draft generation, multi-agent review, humanization, and publishing — across multiple brands from a single instance.

## Key features

- Research pipeline with 10+ retrievers (RSS, search APIs, YouTube, competitors)
- Multi-dimensional content scoring (relevance, credibility, trend signal, brand alignment)
- Platform-native draft generation (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, blog, newsletter)
- 4-agent GOD Mode review (critic, fact-checker, creative enhancer, synthesis)
- Content humanizer that strips AI patterns and applies brand voice
- Writing Lab with challenger/champion A/B rounds
- Native multi-tenancy with per-brand isolated data, credentials, and configuration
- Social publishing via self-hosted Postiz satellite
- Newsletter composition and delivery (Resend, Brevo, Mailchimp)
- Deep research via local-deep-research Docker sidecar
- Competitor content monitoring
- AI image generation per draft
- Feedback loop: social metrics influence future content scoring
- Cost tracking and LLM provider observability

## Tech stack

Next.js 16 (frontend) + Python FastAPI (backend) + Supabase (database + auth) + Docker

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/davidesilver/ZeroHuman-Agency
